name: Pumpkin Snack Cake
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons light corn oil spread (1/2 stick)
1 cup canned solid-pack pumpkin (not pumpkin pie filling)
1/2 cup thawed, frozen no-cholesterol egg substitute
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Generously spray a 13 x 9 inch ceramic or glass baking dish with nonstick cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, beat the brown sugar and corn oil spread together until well mixed (about 2 minutes), constantly scraping the bowl with a rubber spatula.
4. Reduce the speed to medium and beat in the pumpkin, egg substitute, milk, and vanilla extract.
5. With the mixture at low speed, add the flour, baking soda, ground cinnamon, ground ginger, baking powder, salt, and ground allspice; beat just until well blended.
6. Pour the batter into the baking dish and spread it evenly.
7. Bake the cake for 25 to 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the cake to cool completely in the baking dish on a wire rack.
9. When cooled, sprinkle with confectioner's sugar. Makes 12 servings.
